# Kidrove.com

> Kidrove is the UAE's leading platform for discovering kids events, activities, workshops, camps, and educational programs. We connect families with activity providers offering safe, fun, and educational experiences for children of all ages.

## Main Sections

- [Events](https://kidrove.com/events): Browse all kids events, activities, and workshops
- [Blog](https://kidrove.com/blog): Parenting tips, kids activity guides, and family content
- [Vendors](https://kidrove.com/vendors): Directory of activity providers and event organizers
- [Collections](https://kidrove.com/collections): Curated event collections by theme and category
- [Categories](https://kidrove.com/categories): Browse activities by category (arts, sports, education)

## Public API Endpoints (JSON)

- [Events API](https://kidrove.com/api/events): List all published events
- [Collections API](https://kidrove.com/api/collections): List all active collections
- [Blog API](https://kidrove.com/api/blog): List all published blog posts
- [Categories API](https://kidrove.com/api/categories): List all active categories
- [Homepage API](https://kidrove.com/api/homepage): Homepage aggregated data

## Optional Files

- [Full LLMs](https://kidrove.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed documentation
- [Robots](https://kidrove.com/robots.txt): Crawler rules

## Contact

- Website: https://kidrove.com
- Email: hello@kidrove.com
